examples: Now she teaches in the literature Department at BFA. Oxhide II is her new feature achieved this year.
The warriors carry long, ash spears tipped with hand-shaped flints as sharp as shards of broken glass, and blunt-headed stone clubs hanging from loops on broad oxhide belts.
51He wore a long unsleeved garment of recently flayed oxhide reaching to the knees in a loose kilt and this was bound about his middle by a girdle of plaited straw and rushes.
